# AI Adelaide

> AI Adelaide is the only Adelaide digital agency that specialises in AI-powered websites, local SEO, and AI automation for Adelaide small businesses. Founded in Adelaide, South Australia. Website design from $699 (one-off, no lock-in). Local SEO from $399/month. AI automation from $199/month. Adelaide-based, Australian-owned, serving all 34 Adelaide suburbs.

AI Adelaide helps Adelaide tradies (plumbers, electricians, builders, HVAC, landscapers), allied health clinics (physio, chiro, dental), cafes and restaurants, beauty salons, retail shops, and professional services capture more customers, rank higher on Google, and automate admin work like missed-call follow-up, AI receptionists, quote follow-ups, and appointment reminders.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://aiadelaide.com.au/): Overview of services, pricing, and Adelaide locations.
- [Contact / Free Audit](https://aiadelaide.com.au/contact): Book a free 15-minute chat or request a $247 AI audit.
- [Pricing](https://aiadelaide.com.au/website-pricing): Website pricing from $699, SEO from $399/mo, automation from $199/mo.
- [Services](https://aiadelaide.com.au/services): Full service catalogue for Adelaide small businesses.
- [Locations Index](https://aiadelaide.com.au/locations): All 34 Adelaide suburbs served.

## Services

- [Website Design Adelaide](https://aiadelaide.com.au/website-design-adelaide): Custom websites for Adelaide small businesses, live in 48 hours.
- [Local SEO Adelaide](https://aiadelaide.com.au/seo): Local SEO from $399/month, focused on ranking for Adelaide suburb + service searches.
- [AI Automation Adelaide](https://aiadelaide.com.au/ai-automation-adelaide): AI-powered admin automation including missed-call text-back, quote follow-up, AI receptionist.
- [AI Receptionist Adelaide](https://aiadelaide.com.au/ai-receptionist-adelaide): 24/7 AI phone answering for Adelaide tradies and clinics.
- [Virtual Receptionist Adelaide](https://aiadelaide.com.au/virtual-receptionist-adelaide): Human + AI hybrid reception coverage.
- [24/7 Answering Service Adelaide](https://aiadelaide.com.au/24-7-answering-service-adelaide): After-hours call handling.
- [Missed-Call Text-Back Adelaide](https://aiadelaide.com.au/missed-call-text-back-adelaide): Automatic SMS response when a tradie misses a call.
- [AI Bookkeeping Adelaide](https://aiadelaide.com.au/bookkeeping-adelaide): Bookkeeping prep and invoice automation.
- [Google Business Profile Optimisation](https://aiadelaide.com.au/google-business-profile-optimisation-adelaide): GBP setup and optimisation for Adelaide businesses.
- [Marketing Adelaide](https://aiadelaide.com.au/marketing-adelaide): Local digital marketing for Adelaide small businesses.
- [AI Marketing](https://aiadelaide.com.au/ai-marketing-adelaide): AI-assisted local marketing.
- [Digital Marketing Adelaide](https://aiadelaide.com.au/digital-marketing-adelaide): SEO, content, and paid acquisition.

## Adelaide Suburbs Served (34)

Inner Adelaide: [North Adelaide](https://aiadelaide.com.au/north-adelaide), [Kent Town](https://aiadelaide.com.au/kent-town), [Stepney](https://aiadelaide.com.au/stepney), [Walkerville](https://aiadelaide.com.au/walkerville), [Norwood](https://aiadelaide.com.au/norwood), [Burnside](https://aiadelaide.com.au/burnside), [Unley](https://aiadelaide.com.au/unley).

East & Hills: [Magill](https://aiadelaide.com.au/magill), [Payneham](https://aiadelaide.com.au/payneham), [Campbelltown](https://aiadelaide.com.au/campbelltown), [Newton](https://aiadelaide.com.au/newton), [Stirling](https://aiadelaide.com.au/stirling), [Crafers](https://aiadelaide.com.au/crafers), [Hahndorf](https://aiadelaide.com.au/hahndorf), [Mount Barker](https://aiadelaide.com.au/mount-barker), [Aberfoyle Park](https://aiadelaide.com.au/aberfoyle-park).

South: [Marion](https://aiadelaide.com.au/marion), [Hallett Cove](https://aiadelaide.com.au/hallett-cove), [Reynella](https://aiadelaide.com.au/reynella), [Morphett Vale](https://aiadelaide.com.au/morphett-vale), [Seaford](https://aiadelaide.com.au/seaford), [Mitcham](https://aiadelaide.com.au/mitcham).

West & Coast: [Henley Beach](https://aiadelaide.com.au/henley-beach), [West Beach](https://aiadelaide.com.au/west-beach), [Findon](https://aiadelaide.com.au/findon), [Glenelg](https://aiadelaide.com.au/glenelg), [Port Adelaide](https://aiadelaide.com.au/port-adelaide), [Moana](https://aiadelaide.com.au/moana).

Trade & Industrial: [Hindmarsh](https://aiadelaide.com.au/hindmarsh), [Prospect](https://aiadelaide.com.au/prospect).

North: [Salisbury](https://aiadelaide.com.au/salisbury), [Elizabeth](https://aiadelaide.com.au/elizabeth), [Modbury](https://aiadelaide.com.au/modbury), [Mawson Lakes](https://aiadelaide.com.au/mawson-lakes).

Each suburb page covers local SEO for that suburb, FAQ for that suburb's businesses, common pain points, AI automation solutions, and pricing.

## Company Information

- **Name**: AI Adelaide
- **Website**: https://aiadelaide.com.au
- **Email**: hello@aiadelaide.com.au
- **Phone**: (08) 7100 9788
- **Address**: 5 Peel St, Adelaide SA 5000, Australia
- **Service Area**: Greater Adelaide, South Australia
- **Founded**: Local Adelaide business, serving all 34 Adelaide suburbs
- **Pricing Anchor**: Websites from $699 (one-off). SEO from $399/month. AI automation from $199/month. No lock-in contracts.
- **Specialties**: AI-powered websites, local SEO for Adelaide suburb + service searches, AI receptionist / missed-call automation, AI bookkeeping, Google Business Profile optimisation.
